sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 20

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 20:1
items.html: (to the question) At the beginning of the Mayin Nukvin, for the sake of the Katnut [smallness] of the Partzuf — when the lower one as yet has no existence at all — it then needs its upper one to raise it. And after it already has the existence of Ibur [conception] and Yenika [suckling], meaning the discernments of NRNHY de Nefesh and NRNHY de Ruach, it then has the ability to rise as MAN to its upper one of itself. (p. 735, Item 6)
